flow-definition.description: Build a Development Kit for SapMachine on linux_ppc64le.<!-- Managed by Jenkins Job Builder -->

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: GIT_REPOSITORY
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: The Git repository to use the devkit makefiles from.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: GIT_REF
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: The branch/ref to use the devkit makefiles from.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: BASE_OS
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: The BASE OS to build the devkit from.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: BASE_OS_VERSION
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: The BASE OS version to build the devkit from.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: GCC_VERSION
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: The GCC version to build the devkit from.
